Worlds

Survival

Spawn: -77, 72, -21

Survival with some plugins.

Command: /warp survival

SMP (Vanilla)

Spawn: 380, 64, 120

Vanilla survival with lots of room to explore.

Command: /warp smpworld

Creative

Spawn: 112, 71, -208

Creative world with tons of builds.

Command: /warp creative

Hub World

Spawn: 152, -40, 325

Hub has portals to other worlds and a forest to explore.

Command: /hub

Tutorial (Old Hub)

Old hub with tutorials and guides.

Command: /warp oldhub

Mini Games

Dropper

World: Dropper

Location: Through the Dropper portal in the Hub

In progress

Hide and Seek

World: Mini Games

Command: /warp hide_and_seek

In progress

PvP

World: Creative

Location: 103, 71, -266

Walk in to be switched to survival with whatever you have.

Parkour — Spiral

World: Parkour_spiral

Location: Through the Portals

Try to make the scoreboard!

Parkour — Biome Run

World: Pk BRR

Location: Through the Portals

See if you can complete one of the many courses.
